topStories.description: Increasingly angry US president escalates his threats to Iran as his deadline for opening Strait of Hormuz approaches.

topStories.title: Trump administration plans to cut cybersecurity agency’s budget by $700 million
topStories.description: The budget proposal would force CISA to operate with a significantly lower budget than previous years, citing the government's claims that the election misinformation programs were used to "target the President."

topStories.title: Rapper Offset ‘stable’ after being shot at Hard Rock Casino in South Florida
topStories.description: A spokesperson for the 34-year-old musician told celebrity news outlet TMZ he was “stable” and being closely monitored at a hospital in Hollywood, Florida.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Iran: ‘A whole civilisation will die tonight’
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump warned that “a whole civilisation will die tonight” if Iran does not open the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Middle East Conflict: White House denies reports of US considering nuclear strikes on Iran following Vance's remarks
dailyNews.description: The White House on Tuesday (local time) denied that remarks by US Vice President JD Vance regarding military operations in Iran contained any suggestions of a nuclear strike against the Islamic Republic.

dailyNews.title: BJP lambasts Kharge over ‘illiterate’ remark, says he does not deserve to be Congress president
dailyNews.description: BJP MP Ravi Shankar Prasad accuses Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge of making such a statement out of hatred for Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

dailyNews.title: From 9pm shutdowns to remote work: Egypt cuts fuel amid power crisis
dailyNews.description: Egypt is one of the countries implementing energy conservation measures amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Bahamas police search for US woman who reportedly fell off boat
dailyNews.description: Her husband told authorities she fell out of their dinghy on Saturday night and was swept out to sea.

dailyNews.title: West Asia war: India activates helpline numbers, urges citizens in Iran to remain indoors as Trump warns Tehran
dailyNews.description: This advisory comes amid a stern warning issued to Iran by US President Donald Trump, who has warned the former of obliterating their entire civilisation if they do not open the Strait of Hormuz by the deadline he has given.

dailyNews.title: Defying Trump's Threat, Iranians Form Human Chain Near Country's Largest Power Plant
dailyNews.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) warned that attacks on US economic interests in the region would intensify if civilian targets in Iran were struck again.

dailyNews.title: Trump's Iran Deadline, The Final Hours LIVE: Trump issues ultimatum to Iran — a ‘whole civilization will die tonight’
dailyNews.description: Trump deadline for Iran countdown live updates: US President Donald Trump set April 7, 8 p.m. EDT (3:30 a.m. Tehran, 5:30 a.m. IST) as the final deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face catastrophic military strikes.

dailyNews.title: ‘Iranians reject idea that US will bring stability’
dailyNews.description: ‘Iranians reject idea that US will bring stability’

dailyNews.description: Iran’s embassies launched a global trolling campaign in response to Trump's profanity-laced threat.

dailyNews.title: Shady deal? Trump admin's New York hotel pact with Pakistan raises stink
dailyNews.description: Shady deal Trump admins New York hotel pact with Pakistan raises stink

dailyNews.description: As US President Donald Trump's deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz looms, Tehran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) on Tuesday (local time) issued a warning to the neighbouring countries. The IRGC said that ‘restraint is over’

dailyNews.title: What’s Iran’s 10-point peace plan that Trump says is ‘not good enough’?
dailyNews.description: As US president's deadline looms, a ceasefire appears unlikely.

dailyNews.title: James Carville delivers blunt reality check about why Democratic Party remains unpopular
dailyNews.description: James Carville told MS NOW the reason Democrats are unpopular is simple: they lost. He said Monday that winning elections is the only cure for low poll numbers.

dailyNews.title: Iryna Zarutska mural moved to new Providence location after pressure campaign from mayor, activists
dailyNews.description: A Providence restaurant owned by immigrants is now displaying a mural honoring slain Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska after left-wing backlash.

dailyNews.title: Kardashian company co-founder advises women to become 'two-hour' mothers
dailyNews.description: Emma Grede, co-founder of Kim Kardashian's Skims, suggested that women should spend no more than three hours a day with their kids in her upcoming book.

dailyNews.title: DeSantis urges Florida lawmakers to ban cousin marriages, links practice to 'stealth jihad'
dailyNews.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis called for banning cousin marriages in his state, rebuking the practice at a Tampa signing ceremony for a new state law.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns 'whole civilization will die tonight,' as Iranian official urges human chains around power plants
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump warned that a "civilization will die tonight" as his threats of strikes on Iranian power plants and bridges loomed ahead of Tuesday's deadline.

dailyNews.title: 77-year-old House Dem facing younger primary challengers seeks to impeach Donald Trump
dailyNews.description: Rep. John Larson mounted a long-shot bid to impeach Trump, citing the president's military intervention in Venezuela as he faces younger primary challengers.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court clears path for DOJ to erase Steve Bannon's Jan 6 conviction
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department had asked the Supreme Court to allow it to proceed with dismissing the contempt case against Steve Bannon, a former Trump advisor and longtime ally.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin terminates some agreements with districts, college on transgender students
dailyNews.description: The Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights has rescinded portions of several resolution agreements that came from prior administrations.

dailyNews.title: Probe to snare Iran rescue leaker 'underway' as Trump threatens jail for imperiling arduous operation
dailyNews.description: An investigation is underway to find who leaked to the press that a U.S. airman was missing in Iran after a fighter jet was shot down on Good Friday, a source told Fox News Digital.

dailyNews.title: Iranians Voice Shock and Defiance in Face of Trump’s Looming Deadline
dailyNews.description: President Trump has threatened devastating attacks if Iran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Some Iranians questioned what had happened to American values.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth Likens Easter Rescue of U.S. Airman to Resurrection of Jesus Christ
dailyNews.description: President Trump also asserted that God supports the American war against Iran “because God is good, and God wants to see people taken care of.”

dailyNews.title: Trump Threatens Jail if Journalists Protect Certain Iran Sources
dailyNews.description: The president indicated he would ask an unnamed media outlet to reveal the sources behind its coverage of Iran’s successful strike on a U.S. fighter jet, and of its crew.

dailyNews.title: Trump Threatens ‘Complete Demolition’ by Midnight, and Dark Money Flows Into Midterms
dailyNews.description: Plus, a look behind the moon.

dailyNews.title: See First Photos From NASA’s Artemis II Moon Mission Capturing a Setting Earth and Eclipse
dailyNews.description: The White House and NASA released imagery captured by the cameras of the four astronauts of the Artemis II mission.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II Astronauts Head Home After Historic Journey Around the Moon
dailyNews.description: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.
